jobs.title: Brand Designer
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>Maven is the world's largest virtual clinic for women and families on a mission to make healthcare work for all of us. Maven's award-winning digital programs are trusted by employers and health plans to support their members across maternity, fertility, parenting, and pediatrics.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Brand Designer at Maven partners with Marketing & Communications to extend the brand's visual system across product surfaces and member touchpoints.</p>

jobs.title: Clinical Outcomes Analyst
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>Maven is the world's largest virtual clinic for women and families. The Clinical Outcomes team measures the longitudinal impact of Maven's programs across maternity, fertility, and parenting.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Clinical Outcomes Analyst partners with Clinical Strategy and Data Science to quantify program efficacy across employer cohorts.</p>
